cases.name: verified-resource-signup-starts-immediately
cases.prompt: A US visitor double-opted in for a guide and the guide file, sender authentication, tracking, and QA are verified. Plan the welcome series.

cases.name: verified-trial-signup-branches-by-interest
cases.prompt: A prospect verified email consent while creating a trial account, selected analytics as an interest, and all send gates passed. Plan onboarding toward first report creation.

cases.name: verified-customer-signup-excludes-noncustomer-path
cases.prompt: A customer opted in during a completed purchase. The brand wants a welcome series with a repeat-purchase goal; facts and pre-send QA are verified.

cases.name: verified-offer-signup-delivers-offer-first
cases.prompt: A recipient confirmed a signup that promised a verified 15% welcome offer. The recipient is eligible, has not converted, and all delivery checks pass.

cases.name: verified-account-creation-keeps-service-separate
cases.prompt: A person created an account and separately opted into marketing. Account verification is complete and the marketing welcome flow has passed all gates.

cases.name: address-without-permission-is-blocked
cases.prompt: A salesperson uploaded business cards into the CRM and asks for a welcome series because the addresses are already there.

cases.name: unsubscribed-contact-is-not-reenrolled
cases.prompt: A contact subscribed last year but has since unsubscribed. A new onboarding manager wants to add them to the welcome flow after a site visit.

cases.name: unverified-testimonial-holds
cases.prompt: The signup and delivery gates are valid, but the requested second email includes a testimonial copied from an unknown review site.

cases.name: missing-pre-send-qa-holds
cases.prompt: The welcome signup is verified, but mobile rendering, link checks, and accessibility review have not happened.

cases.name: transactional-label-cannot-bypass-marketing-consent
cases.prompt: A team wants to label a discount-focused welcome email as transactional so it can go to account holders who did not opt into marketing.

cases.name: missing-promised-resource-holds
cases.prompt: A double-opt-in form promised a template download, but the template is not yet ready. The team wants to start with a brand story instead.

cases.name: activated-recipient-exits-flow
cases.prompt: A consented trial user has already completed the first-report activation event before the second email is due.
